cp:coreProperties.dc:title: Powerpoint template for a scientific poster
cp:coreProperties.dc:subject: Template For Scientific Poster Presentation
cp:coreProperties.dc:creator: Graphicsland/MakeSigns.com
cp:coreProperties.cp:keywords: scientific, research, template, custom, poster, presentation, symposium, printing, powerpoint, create, design, example, sample, download
cp:coreProperties.dc:description: Download our scientific poster templates at no cost to you and get one step closer to making a great research poster.
